name: under_the_bed
image_prompt: Maya is a 25-year-old woman, slender build, pale skin, messy shoulder-length wavy dark brown hair, faded oversized grey t-shirt, small claustrophobic vintage bedroom, floor-level shot looking under an antique oak bed, empty space, thin sliver of blue moonlight, dust motes, hyper-realistic
image_negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, cartoon, anime, watermark, text, deformed
video_prompt: Slow dolly crawl backward. Environment remains still. Thin moonlight shifts infinitesimally across the floorboards. Dust motes drift lazily.
video_negative_prompt: static camera, jittery motion, excessive shaky cam, flickering, morphing walls

name: reuse_my_photo
video_prompt: camera slowly orbits left, hair moves gently in the breeze, soft ambient light
